creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Please close. The version 20070815 was an interim release which has
known issues and failed to fix the multiple-targets bug currently under
investigation. We will wait for a newer release (on the way) to address
this matter fully.

-- 
Said one park ranger, 'There is considerable overlap between the 
 intelligence of the smartest bears and the dumbest tourists.'
Mark D. Foster, CISSP <mark@foster.cc>  http://mark.foster.cc/
